vocab.example: What I appreciated most was the school's focus on holistic development rather than just academic grades.

vocab.meaning: một cộng đồng gắn kết chặt chẽ
vocab.example: My primary school felt like a close-knit community where every teacher knew the students by name.

vocab.meaning: cơ sở vật chất hiện đại bậc nhất
vocab.example: We were quite fortunate to have state-of-the-art facilities, especially the science laboratories and the indoor pool.

vocab.meaning: tinh thần ham học hỏi/tò mò
vocab.example: The teachers were excellent at sparking an inquisitive mind in us through interactive storytelling.
To be honest, the only thing I disliked was the subtle peer pressure to excel in sports.
The school’s pedagogical approach was quite progressive for its time, focusing heavily on hands-on learning.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng niềm yêu thích đối với...
vocab.example: My art teacher really helped cultivate a love for painting that I still carry with me today.
I still have vivid memories of the annual school festivals which were the highlight of the year.

vocab.meaning: một trải nghiệm đáng sợ/nản lòng
vocab.example: Walking into such a large secondary school at age eleven was initially a daunting experience for me.

vocab.meaning: tình bạn thân thiết, sự đồng lòng
vocab.example: The sense of camaraderie among my classmates made even the most difficult exams feel bearable.
